title: Rivian Q4 2025 and Full Year Earnings Report
text: Rivian Q4 2025 saw production of 10,974 vehicles and deliveries of 9,745. Full year 2025 assembled 42,284 vehicles and delivered 42,247. Q4 2025 consolidated revenues were $1.29 billion, down from $1.73 billion in Q4 2024, while automotive revenues were $839 million, down 45% year-over-year. Software and services revenues reached $447 million, up 109% year-over-year from $214 million. Full year 2025 consolidated revenues were $5.29 billion, up 8% from $4.97 billion in 2024. Automotive revenues declined 15% year-over-year to $3.83 billion while software and services revenues surged to $1.56 billion from $484 million in 2024. Q4 gross profit was $120 million, down from $170 million, while full year 2025 gross profit was $144 million versus negative $1.2 billion in 2024. Automotive gross profit was negative $432 million while software and services gross profit reached $576 million. For 2026, Rivian targets 62,000-67,000 vehicle deliveries, adjusted EBITDA of negative $2.10 billion to negative $1.80 billion, and capital expenditures of $1.95 billion-$2.05 billion.
